title: VSE Gamepad Lite
description: addon for VS: Eureka - gamepad support for ship control with extra features, made by MJ
body:
Now you can control your VS: Eureka ship with gamepad !



VSE Gamepad Lite - with new features and more customizability !

- Now available on Forge, Fabric 1.18, 1.19 & 1.20.
- Pure client side - play multiplayer on servers.
- New Config options - enable/disable Gamepad, selectGamepad.
- Supports xbox, ps & generic gamepads.



Mappings: 

> ship movement - left joystick

> ship ascend - button A on xbox / X on ps / 2 on generic



Note:

1. it only adds control for ship if you want full player control with gamepad you can use any other gamepad mods, tested with [Controllable](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/controllable).

2. you can assign any gamepad button to ship descend and cruise by your choice using [Controllable](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/controllable) or [MidnightControls](https://modrinth.com/mod/midnightcontrols).



give your feedback/issues on github [issue](https://github.com/MJPC83/VSEGamepadLite/issues) portal.



my Discord for contact : mj_83_
